history.content: Hi! I'm here from Riverbend Community Foundation. How can I help you today?
I donated $250 in December and need a tax receipt for my accountant.

output.response: Thank you for supporting Riverbend! I found your $250 gift from December 12 — I've emailed a PDF tax receipt to the address on file. If you need it resent or sent to a different email, just let me know.

history.content: Hi! I'm here from Riverbend Community Foundation. How can I help you today?
I'd like to volunteer at the Saturday food pantry this weekend.
Thank you for offering your time — our pantry team can always use help!
What do I need to do to sign up?

arguments.topic: signing up for the Saturday pantry shift

output.response: Please complete our 10-minute volunteer waiver at riverbend.org/volunteer, then choose the Saturday 9am–1pm pantry shift on March 15. You'll get a confirmation email with parking and check-in details. Wear closed-toe shoes and we'll provide a name tag when you arrive.
